name: Men's Haircut
description: Professional haircut with styling, wash & blow dry. Includes a hot towel finish.

name: Women's Haircut & Styling
description: Precision cut with wash, conditioning treatment and professional blow-dry styling.

name: Hair Coloring
description: Full hair coloring with premium products. Includes highlights or balayage options.

name: Keratin Treatment
description: Smoothing keratin treatment for frizz-free, shiny, and manageable hair up to 3 months.

name: Classic Facial
description: Deep cleansing facial with extraction, mask, and moisturizer for refreshed glowing skin.

name: HydraFacial
description: Advanced hydra-dermabrasion facial that cleanses, exfoliates, and hydrates the skin.

name: Swedish Massage
description: Full body relaxation massage using long strokes, kneading, and circular movements.

name: Deep Tissue Massage
description: Intense massage targeting deep muscle layers to relieve chronic tension and knots.

name: Hot Stone Massage
description: Therapeutic massage using heated volcanic stones placed on key pressure points.

name: Manicure & Gel Polish
description: Nail shaping, cuticle care, hand massage and long-lasting gel polish application.

name: Pedicure & Gel Polish
description: Foot soak, exfoliation, nail shaping, and gel polish for beautifully groomed feet.

name: Beard Trim & Grooming
description: Expert beard shaping, trimming, and conditioning with hot towel treatment.

name: Bridal Makeup Package
description: Complete bridal makeup with trial session, hairstyling, and touch-up kit for the big day.

name: Eyebrow Threading
description: Precise eyebrow shaping using the threading technique for clean, defined brows.

name: Full Body Waxing
description: Complete body waxing using premium hypoallergenic wax for smooth, hair-free skin.
